High-quality tuition is provided by our tutors, whoLeith School of Art;More details here, shared by RIAS Bookshop.;Edinburgh University Charity Fashion Show;More details here, shared by Edinburgh University Fashion Society.;Newhaven Death Café;More details here, shared by Bob Parker, End of Life Doula UK.;Habitat 〜 Easter Sunday 〜 Day PartyHabitat returns to Jamaica Yard this Easter Sunday for a special daytime session!
Kicking things off from 2pm through until 10pm, we’ll have the full afternoon and evening to dig deep into our record bags. Expect an uplifting journey through deep dance music — freeform as ever, no boundaries.
We’re super excited to welcome our friend Chris Menist (Paradise Bangkok) joining us behind the decks! Chris is a longtime musical explorer and serious record digger, known for uncovering incredible sounds from around the world. Through Paradise Bangkok and his long-running NTS Radio show, he’s built a reputation for deep, adventurous selections.
We’ll also be providing some tasty food on the day, More details on that soon.
Jamaica Yard is a unique party space with limited capacity, and based on previous events we expect this one to fill up quickly. We’d recommend picking up a ticket in advance to avoid missing out.
We cannot wait to see you there! Jamaica Yard, 3 Jamaica St, Edinburgh EH3 6HH
